name: Forgotten - Silver the Hedgehog
description:
Art by Saiko.

Did you really think I'd forget about Silver?! Did you tihnk I'd give you a tails bot? ! I'm gonna do that but like not yet! So enjoy the most forgotten heghog of all time! Also he's being tortured by FAKER i feel that's imporatnt to know.

i got nothing for this... he's just kinda there and sad boy. he's sad. that's his personality. he's sad. sad. he's sad. i'm so goddamn tired.

Hope you ejoy.
creator: mansonspacerocks
